checks.detail: Live gate conformance has hard failures.
Route lock, gate router, source freshness, or giveback guard is not confirmed on.
No route is currently allowed to trade.
Permission manifest contains no ALLOW_FULL or ALLOW_PROBE routes.
Live broker/order safety reconcile is clean.
Contract health still has failures; certificate only hard-blocks live gate/order safety failures.

next_actions.action: Live gate conformance has hard failures.
Run the gate/router rebuild BATs, then rerun the certification.
Decide which route is allowed to trade; right now the bot has nothing permitted.
Contract health still has failures; certificate only hard-blocks live gate/order safety failures.
For the final morning check after the bot is running, rerun with --require-live-runtime.
